Software & IT
The AI workspace that works with you
Confluence is the one place for all your ideas, docs, knowledge, and human+AI teammates.
Work email
*
Use a work email to find teammates and get access to Rovo AI
Sign up
Or continue with
Google
Powering every stage of work
See how Confluence connects your teams from ideas to knowledge to impact.
Put pen to paper. No hassle.
Beat the blank page with AI creation and ready-to-use templates. Draft PRDs, social briefs, annual plans, and more in seconds.
Transform ideas into action
Get to outcomes faster. Take ideas from concept to strategy to action effortlessly with Rovo AI.
Get context and answers
Team workspaces and AI search helps you find exactly what you’re looking for, in a fraction of the time.
Stay in the know, your way
Get up-to-date on all the work happening around you with AI page and comment summaries, audio briefings, and integrations.
Work faster, smarter, and together with Rovo
Get more done with Rovo, Atlassian's AI solution that helps you find answers, speed up work, and unlock creativity.
Revisualize content, instantly
Turn content into timelines, charts, maps, and even slides so that complex ideas are easier to understand.
Explore Remix
Answers from anywhere
Unlock knowledge across all of your apps, tools and data sources to get relevant, accurate answers in seconds.
Move work along with agents
Turn notes into polished decks, spec docs into interactive prototypes, and so much more. AI agents in Confluence help you handle what comes next.
Turn thoughts into action
Add and track work from anywhere. Use Rovo to keep it all organized.

Read all stories
By getting out of multiple other tools and bringing together all of this scattered information, people will know where to find what they need…Confluence will be our single source of truth for documentation moving forward.”
MATT CHESTER, Senior System Engineer
Read story
The big win that we've seen through Confluence Cloud is definitely collaboration. More teams can work together and collaborate. It's a very open way of working.”
DAMIEN DAVIS, Lead Atlassian Administrator
Read story
Confluence has been massively easier to use than Sharepoint, and it’s more consistent and easier to navigate than Google Docs.”
ANDREI TUCH, Atlassian Product Owner at Riverty
Read story
By leveraging Jira and Confluence for automated reporting, we’re saving over 800 hours and $500k per year in management consulting costs previously spent on manual reporting.”
WAIS MOJADDIDI, Director of Agile Delivery, Global E-commerce
Read story
We’ve been able to reduce our cycle time and increase throughput by 200%, which means we’re delivering capabilities to customers faster and increasing customer satisfaction.”
MAI LIAN SCARLETT, Former Senior Director, Agile Transformation Office
Read story
Unlock human+AI teamwork, in one collection
Get Rovo, Jira, Confluence, and Loom in one collection. Bring AI insights to your projects, knowledge, and video communication, all in one place.

Privacy policy
Notice at Collection
Terms
Impressum
Language selector
English
▾
Manage Preferences
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Software & IT
Build Your Source of Truth
Team size:
users
Bill me:
Monthly
Annually
SAVE UP TO 17%
Free
Free forever for 10 users
$0
Start free trial
Includes:
Pages
Pages are used to create, share, and edit knowledge. These are living documents you can create and update for almost anything – from project plans, meeting notes, policies and more.
Spaces
Spaces are how you organize pages into meaningful categories, like different folders where you can store your work.
Organize and connect work with databases
Confluence databases are a central source of info that dramatically changes the way that teams can organize, reference, and display data in Confluence.
Learn more
.
Templates for Marketing, Product, Program Management and more
Get started quickly by using the
template library
. From product requirement documents to marketing plans, there’s a template that’s perfect fit for your project.
Up to 3 active whiteboards per user
Confluence whiteboards brings the flexibility of a digital whiteboard into your team workspace. Collaborate, brainstorm, draw and visualize ideas in a freeform way with up to 3 active whiteboards per user.
Learn more.
10 automation rule runs per month
Increase efficiency by replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes and workflows. With Free, unlock 10 automation rule runs per instance per month.
Learn more.
Support for apps and integrations
Integrate Confluence with other apps you’re already using.
Learn more.
Support from Atlassian Community
Get support from the
Atlassian Community
, a public forum of community experts where you can ask questions. You can also access free Confluence guides and knowledge base articles.
Up to 2 GB file storage
Standard
Everything you need to get started
$5.42
per user / month
Start free trial
Everything from Free, plus:
Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, with integrated AI-powered work features
Unlock knowledge, create together, and tackle the biggest challenges with Rovo Search, Chat, and specialized Agents.
Free guest access
Invite external partners to collaborate as guests in your Confluence site. Guests are free of charge, up to 5 guests per paid user.
You can also share view-only Confluence pages via public links. This can be useful for sharing information to the public, like customer FAQs and release notes.
Advanced permissions
Control who can view, edit and comment on your pages, so important information can stay restricted until you’re ready to share.
100 automation rule runs per month
Increase efficiency by replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes and workflows. With Standard, unlock 100 automation rule runs per instance per month.
Learn more.
250 GB of storage
9/5 regional support
Customer support during business hours is available with Confluence Standard plan.
Learn more.
Up to 250,000 users per site
Recommended
Premium
Connect work across teams
$10.44
per user / month
Start free trial
Everything from Standard, plus:
Unlimited pages
Pages are used to create, share, and edit knowledge. These are living documents you can create and update for almost anything – from project plans, meeting notes, policies and more. You can create as many pages as you need.
Unlimited spaces
Spaces are how you organize pages into meaningful categories, like different folders where you can store your work. You can create as many spaces as you need.
Dynamic intranet
New
Customize a dynamic info hub for your entire company with company hub, a single go-to destination for company news, announcements, and resources.
Learn more.
10x more automations
Save time by automating repetitive, manual tasks to organize and manage content at scale. Get started quickly with out-of-the box templates or build your own powerful, custom rules by using the low-code / no-code rule builder and with AI. With Premium, unlock up to 1,000 automations per user per month.
Learn more.
Unlimited whiteboards
Confluence whiteboards brings the flexibility of a digital whiteboard into your team workspace. With Premium, unlock unlimited whiteboards and advanced Jira integrations to brainstorm, plan and action work like never before.
Learn more.
Admin controls and insights
Inspect permissions to specify who can do and create what, and fix permission problems quickly with an admin key. Manage site health, get actionable alerts, and unlock site-level insights, all in one place.
Unlimited storage
24/7 support for critical issues
Get Premium support around the clock from a dedicated team with 1-hour response times to critical issues.
Learn more.
99.9% uptime SLA
Enterprise
Advanced analytics, scale and security for enterprises
Billed annually.
Switch to Annual billing above to view Enterprise pricing.
Contact sales
Everything from Premium, plus:
Cross-product insights with Atlassian Analytics and Data Lake
Aggregate data from across your Atlassian toolchain for holistic insights that drive better decision making.
Advanced admin controls and security
Manage users and security at scale with advanced governance controls like advanced encryption and Shadow IT controls.
Enterprise-grade identity and access management
Get support for multiple identity providers (IdPs) within your central admin console, plus SCIM, enforce SSO, and more with
Atlassian Guard Standard
included.
Unlimited automations
Increase efficiency by replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes and workflows.
Learn more.
Multiple sites (up to 150)
Enable data isolation and administrative autonomy. Customize each instance to the needs of the teams who use it.
24/7 support for all issues
Get help 24/7 via dedicated phone number and senior team, with 30 minute response time for critical issues.
Learn more.
99.95% uptime SLA
Compare features
Learn about features
Free
Standard
Premium
Enterprise
Core Features.
User limit per site
This is the maximum number of users or user licenses you can add to each of your Confluence sites.
Free
10 users
Standard
250,000 users
Premium
250,000 users
Enterprise
250,000 users
Number of sites
This is the number of sites (also called “instances”) you can license based on the subscription plan you choose.
One site is typically enough for most small to medium organizations because you can still have multiple pages on a single site for different teams to maintain their knowledge bases, workflows, etc.
Enterprise subscribers often opt for multiple sites, up to 150 per product, to:
Learn more
about instances in Confluence.

Enterprise
Unlimited
Automation
Build flexible rules to reduce repetitive, manual tasks – from archiving content to notifying teams. Automation helps your teams save time, increase efficiency, and reduce risk of manual errors.
Free plan comes with 10 rule runs per month while Standard plan comes with 100.
Premium users have 1,000 rule executions per paid monthly user. For example, a Confluence Cloud Premium site with 200 users will have 200,000 monthly rule executions each month.
Enterprise sites have unlimited automation executions.
You only pay for what you use - only automations that successfully perform an action count towards your limit.
Learn more
about automation.

Manage Preferences
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

analysis.name: Confluence
analysis.tagline: The AI workspace that works with you
analysis.value_proposition: A connected team workspace for creating, organizing, and collaborating on knowledge, docs, and projects with native Rovo AI assistance across the entire Atlassian toolchain.
analysis.ideal_customer: Software and cross-functional teams — especially those already on Jira — needing a central knowledge base with deep project tool integration

features.name: pages
features.description: Living documents for project plans, meeting notes, policies, and any team knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Pages are used to create, share, and edit knowledge. These are living documents you can create and update

features.name: spaces
features.description: Folders/categories for organizing pages by team, project, or topic
features.evidence_quote: Spaces are how you organize pages into meaningful categories, like different folders where you can store your work

features.name: databases
features.description: Structured data tables to organize, reference, and display data centrally in Confluence
features.evidence_quote: Confluence databases are a central source of info that dramatically changes the way that teams can organize, reference, and display data

features.name: whiteboards
features.description: Freeform digital whiteboard for brainstorming, drawing, and visual collaboration
features.evidence_quote: Confluence whiteboards brings the flexibility of a digital whiteboard into your team workspace

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built page templates for marketing plans, PRDs, meeting notes, project management, and more
features.evidence_quote: Templates for Marketing, Product, Program Management and more. From product requirement documents to marketing plans

features.name: blueprints
features.description: Structured page templates for decisions, meeting notes, product requirements, retrospectives, and how-to articles
features.evidence_quote: Decisions Blueprint, Meeting Notes Blueprint, Product Requirements Blueprint, Retrospective Blueprint

features.name: live docs
features.description: Real-time collaborative document editing with simultaneous multi-user co-authoring
features.evidence_quote: Live docs

features.name: slides
features.description: Native presentation creation within Confluence, turning page content into slides
features.evidence_quote: Turn content into timelines, charts, maps, and even slides so that complex ideas are easier to understand

features.name: video content
features.description: Native video embedding and playback as a first-class content type within pages
features.evidence_quote: Videos

features.name: automation rules
features.description: Low-code/no-code rules to automate repetitive content management and workflow tasks
features.evidence_quote: Increase efficiency by replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes and workflows

features.name: rovo ai search
features.description: AI-powered search across Confluence and connected apps and data sources for fast, relevant answers
features.evidence_quote: Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, with integrated AI-powered work features. Unlock knowledge, create together

features.name: rovo ai chat
features.description: Conversational AI assistant for asking questions and getting answers grounded in workspace knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, with integrated AI-powered work features

features.name: rovo ai agents
features.description: Specialized AI agents that automate tasks like turning notes into polished decks or specs into prototypes
features.evidence_quote: Turn notes into polished decks, spec docs into interactive prototypes, and so much more. AI agents in Confluence

features.name: ai page summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of pages to quickly catch up on content
features.evidence_quote: Get up-to-date on all the work happening around you with AI page and comment summaries

features.name: ai comment summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of page comment threads
features.evidence_quote: AI page and comment summaries, audio briefings, and integrations

features.name: audio briefings
features.description: AI-generated spoken audio summaries of pages for on-the-go consumption
features.evidence_quote: AI page and comment summaries, audio briefings, and integrations

features.name: remix
features.description: AI-powered content transformation that converts page content into timelines, charts, maps, or slides
features.evidence_quote: Turn content into timelines, charts, maps, and even slides so that complex ideas are easier to understand. Explore Remix

features.name: ai content creation
features.description: AI-assisted drafting of documents, PRDs, social briefs, annual plans, and other content from prompts
features.evidence_quote: Beat the blank page with AI creation and ready-to-use templates. Draft PRDs, social briefs, annual plans in seconds

features.name: teamwork graph
features.description: Connects teams, work, and goals across Atlassian products to surface context in the flow of work
features.evidence_quote: Link teams, work, and goals to unlock context right in your flow of work. Explore Teamwork Graph

features.name: advanced permissions
features.description: Granular control over who can view, edit, and comment on pages and spaces
features.evidence_quote: Control who can view, edit and comment on your pages, so important information can stay restricted

features.name: guest access
features.description: Free external collaborator seats, up to 5 guests per paid user
features.evidence_quote: Invite external partners to collaborate as guests in your Confluence site. Guests are free of charge, up to 5 guests per paid user

features.name: public page sharing
features.description: Share view-only pages via public links for external audiences such as FAQs and release notes
features.evidence_quote: Share view-only Confluence pages via public links. Useful for sharing information to the public

features.name: company hub
features.description: Dynamic intranet landing page for company-wide news, announcements, and resources
features.evidence_quote: Customize a dynamic info hub for your entire company with company hub, a single go-to destination for company news

features.name: admin controls and insights
features.description: Permission inspection, site health monitoring, actionable alerts, and site-level usage analytics
features.evidence_quote: Inspect permissions to specify who can do and create what, and fix permission problems quickly with an admin key

features.name: 99.9% uptime sla
features.description: Contractual uptime guarantee on Premium and above plans
features.evidence_quote: 99.9% uptime SLA

features.name: atlassian analytics
features.description: Cross-product analytics dashboard aggregating data from the entire Atlassian toolchain
features.evidence_quote: Cross-product insights with Atlassian Analytics and Data Lake. Aggregate data from across your Atlassian toolchain

features.name: data lake
features.description: Enterprise data lake for aggregating and querying Atlassian toolchain data at scale
features.evidence_quote: Cross-product insights with Atlassian Analytics and Data Lake

features.name: sso / multiple identity providers
features.description: Enterprise-grade IAM with support for multiple IdPs within a central admin console
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-grade identity and access management. Get support for multiple identity providers (IdPs) within your central admin

features.name: advanced encryption
features.description: Enhanced encryption controls for enterprise security and compliance requirements
features.evidence_quote: Manage users and security at scale with advanced governance controls like advanced encryption and Shadow IT controls

features.name: shadow it controls
features.description: Controls to detect and manage unauthorized app usage within the organization
features.evidence_quote: advanced governance controls like advanced encryption and Shadow IT controls

features.name: team calendars
features.description: Shared team calendars embeddable in pages with Jira event integration and calendar subscriptions
features.evidence_quote: Team Calendars Quick Tour. Create, Add, and Edit Calendars. Add Jira Events. Embed Calendars on Confluence Pages

features.name: analytics / page insights
features.description: View engagement and traffic analytics on individual pages, spaces, and the whole site
features.evidence_quote: View insights on your site. View insights on spaces. View insights on pages

features.name: macros
features.description: Embeddable dynamic content blocks including charts, code, Jira issues, roadmaps, galleries, and 40+ others
features.evidence_quote: Chart Macro, Code Block Macro, Jira Issues Macro, Roadmap Planner Macro, Table of Contents Macro

features.name: jira integration
features.description: Embed Jira issues, charts, reports, and sprint data directly in Confluence pages
features.evidence_quote: Jira Issues Macro, Jira Chart Macro, Jira Report Blueprint, Add Jira Events

features.name: page history and version comparison
features.description: Full edit history for every page with side-by-side diff view between versions
features.evidence_quote: Page History and Page Comparison Views

features.name: labels
features.description: Tag pages and spaces with labels for categorization and cross-space content discovery
features.evidence_quote: Add, Remove and Search for Labels. Use Labels to Categorize Spaces

features.name: export to pdf, word, html, xml
features.description: Export individual pages or entire spaces to multiple document formats
features.evidence_quote: Export Content to Word, PDF, HTML and XML. Customize Exports to PDF

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native iOS and Android app with MDM support and OAuth 2.0
features.evidence_quote: Using the Confluence Data Center and Server mobile app. Mobile Device Management (MDM)

features.name: collaborative editing
features.description: Simultaneous multi-user editing with merge conflict resolution
features.evidence_quote: Collaborative editing. Concurrent Editing and Merging Changes

features.name: page restrictions
features.description: Restrict view and edit access at the individual page level, independent of space permissions
features.evidence_quote: Page restrictions

features.name: inline comments
features.description: Threaded comments on pages and blog posts, including inline comments on specific content
features.evidence_quote: Comment on pages and blog posts

features.name: mentions
features.description: Tag users with @mentions to notify them in pages and comments
features.evidence_quote: Mentions. Autocomplete for links, files, macros, mentions and emojis

features.name: watch and email notifications
features.description: Subscribe to pages, spaces, and blogs to receive email notifications on changes
features.evidence_quote: Watch Pages, Spaces and Blogs. Email Notifications

features.name: workbox notifications
features.description: In-app notification center aggregating mentions, watches, and task updates
features.evidence_quote: Workbox Notifications

features.name: rss feeds
features.description: Subscribe to Confluence content changes via generated RSS feeds
features.evidence_quote: Subscribe to RSS Feeds within Confluence. The RSS Feed Builder

features.name: search
features.description: Full-text search across pages, spaces, and people with advanced CQL syntax
features.evidence_quote: Confluence Search Syntax. Confluence Search Fields. Ranking of Search Results

features.name: office connector
features.description: Edit Office files (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) directly from Confluence via companion app
features.evidence_quote: Edit in Office using the Office Connector. Install Atlassian Companion

features.name: blog posts
features.description: Space-level blog for team news, updates, and announcements separate from documentation pages
features.evidence_quote: Blog posts. Watch Pages, Spaces and Blogs

features.name: tasks
features.description: Inline task creation and assignment within pages, with task report tracking
features.evidence_quote: Add, Assign, and View Tasks. Task Report Macro

features.name: space permissions
features.description: Role-based access control for each space independently
features.evidence_quote: Space Permissions Overview. Assign Space Permissions

features.name: inspect permissions
features.description: Admin diagnostics tool to check and fix permission issues across the site
features.evidence_quote: Inspect permissions. Check who can view a page

features.name: roadmap planner macro
features.description: Visual roadmap macro for displaying project timelines directly in pages
features.evidence_quote: Roadmap Planner Macro

features.name: file attachments
features.description: Upload, display, manage, and share file attachments on pages with inline preview
features.evidence_quote: Upload Files. Display Files and Images. Manage Files. Share and Comment on Files

features.name: people directory
features.description: Searchable organization-wide user directory with profile pages
features.evidence_quote: Search the People Directory

features.name: include page / excerpt macro
features.description: Embed and reuse content from one Confluence page inside another via transclusion
features.evidence_quote: Include Page Macro, Excerpt Include Macro, Excerpt Macro

features.name: code block macro
features.description: Syntax-highlighted code blocks for embedding code snippets in pages
features.evidence_quote: Code Block Macro

features.name: table of contents macro
features.description: Auto-generated navigable table of contents for long-form pages
features.evidence_quote: Table of Contents Macro

features.name: confluence groups
features.description: User groups for bulk permission assignment and management
features.evidence_quote: Confluence Groups

features.name: save for later
features.description: Bookmark pages to a personal reading list for deferred review
features.evidence_quote: Save for later

features.name: space archiving
features.description: Archive spaces to preserve content while removing them from active navigation
features.evidence_quote: Archive a Space

features.name: page copy and move
features.description: Copy or move pages within or across spaces while preserving structure
features.evidence_quote: Move and Reorder Pages. Copy a Page

features.name: marketplace app ecosystem
features.description: Extensibility via 1800+ third-party apps from the Atlassian Marketplace
features.evidence_quote: Showing 1860 apps

features.name: 9/5 regional support
features.description: Business-hours customer support available on Standard plan
features.evidence_quote: 9/5 regional support. Customer support during business hours is available with Confluence Standard plan

features.name: 24/7 critical support
features.description: Around-the-clock support with 1-hour SLA response for critical issues
features.evidence_quote: Get Premium support around the clock from a dedicated team with 1-hour response times to critical issues

features.name: import word document
features.description: Import existing Microsoft Word documents into Confluence as editable pages
features.evidence_quote: Import a Word Document into Confluence

features.name: page layouts, columns and sections
features.description: Multi-column and section-based layout system for structuring page visual design
features.evidence_quote: Page Layouts, Columns and Sections

differentiators: Rovo AI natively embedded across search, chat, and autonomous agents within the same workspace
Remix: AI transforms existing page content into timelines, charts, maps, and slides without leaving the doc
Audio briefings let users consume page content as spoken audio
Teamwork Graph links teams, work, and goals for contextual cross-product navigation
Deep native Jira integration — issues, charts, and sprint data live inside docs
Scales to 250,000 users per site on Standard plan
Atlassian Analytics + Data Lake for cross-product BI across the full toolchain (Enterprise)
Company Hub as a branded dynamic intranet built on top of Confluence (Premium)

recent_ships.what: Company Hub (dynamic intranet) — labeled 'New' on pricing page
recent_ships.source: Dynamic intranet New — Customize a dynamic info hub for your entire company with company hub

recent_ships.what: Rovo AI (search, chat, agents) included in Standard tier and above
recent_ships.source: Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, with integrated AI-powered work features

recent_ships.what: Remix feature for AI-powered content revisualization
recent_ships.source: Revisualize content, instantly — Turn content into timelines, charts, maps, and even slides

praised: Single source of truth: 'Confluence will be our single source of truth for documentation moving forward' — Matt Chester, Senior System Engineer
Collaboration: 'The big win we've seen through Confluence Cloud is definitely collaboration. More teams can work together' — Damien Davis, Lead Atlassian Administrator
Better than SharePoint/Google Docs: 'Confluence has been massively easier to use than Sharepoint, and it's more consistent and easier to navigate than Google Docs' — Andrei Tuch
Cost savings: 'saving over 800 hours and $500k per year in management consulting costs previously spent on manual reporting' — Wais Mojaddidi
Throughput: 'reduce our cycle time and increase throughput by 200%' — Mai Lian Scarlett
complaints: Notoriously poor search: HN thread 'Ask HN: Why is Confluence Wiki Search so bad?' (176↑, 124 comments)
Recurring critical security vulnerabilities: multiple HN threads on CVEs, zero-day exploits, mass exploitation, and a leaked hardcoded password
General product fatigue: 'We deserve better than Confluence and Notion' (165↑, 113 comments)
Strong demand for open-source alternatives: BookStack and custom builds gaining significant HN traction as Confluence replacements (500+ upvotes each)

free_tier.limits: 10 users max, 2GB storage, 3 active whiteboards/user, 10 automation runs/month

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pages, spaces, databases, templates, 3 whiteboards/user, 10 automations/month, 2GB storage, community support

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Rovo AI (search/chat/agents), guest access (5/paid user), advanced permissions, 100 automations/month, 250GB storage, 9/5 support

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited pages/spaces/whiteboards, company hub, 1000 automations/user/month, unlimited storage, 24/7 support, 99.9% SLA

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Atlassian Analytics + Data Lake, advanced security/encryption, multiple IdPs, shadow IT controls, annual billing only

pricing.notes: Enterprise available on annual billing only. Prices for Standard/Premium shown are annual-billing per-seat rates; monthly billing available at higher rates (save up to 17% annually). Free tier hard-capped at 10 users. Standard supports up to 250,000 users/site.
